memoryArtifacts.headline: Alexander Livingston was born before 1375
memoryArtifacts.description:
«b»Biography«/b»
Historical Family
Alexander Livingston was born before 1375, because he was the oldest of his father's four sons by his first marriage and his father married again in 1381. He was pro …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Livingstone of Callendar於大約1375年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可時，他的父親John Livingston of Callendar30歲，母親Marjorie Menteith21歲。他於1399年與Janet Dundas在蘇格蘭藍納可爾波特 登達斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年11月6日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Livingstone of Callendar于大约1375年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可时，他的父亲John Livingston of Callendar30岁，母亲Marjorie Menteith21岁。他于1399年与Janet Dundas在苏格兰藍納可爾波特 登達斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年11月6日在苏格兰斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Livingstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Livingston
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Levingston
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Livingstone  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Livingstone of Callendar was born about 1375, in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Livingston of Callendar, was 30 and his mother, Marjorie Menteith, was 21. He married Janet Dundas in 1399, in Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 November 1451, in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Livingstone of Callendar est né environ 1375, à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Livingston of Callendar, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Menteith, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Janet Dundas en 1399, à Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1451, à Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Livingstone of Callendar um 1375 in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Livingston of Callendar 30 und seine Mutter Marjorie Menteith 21. Er hat 1399 in Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland Janet Dundas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1451 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Livingstone of Callendar è nato il circa 1375 nel Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Livingston of Callendar, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marjorie Menteith, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Janet Dundas nel 1399, nel Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1451, nel Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Livingstone of Callendarが約1375年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクで生まれた時，父John Livingston of Callendarは30歳，母Marjorie Menteithは21歳であった。1399年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアポルト ダンダスでJanet Dundasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年11月6日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカレンダー パークで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Livingstone of Callendar(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Livingston of Callendar(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Menteith(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1399년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 포트 던다스에서 Janet Dundas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 11월 6일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 캘렌더르 박에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Livingstone of Callendar nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Livingston of Callendar, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie Menteith, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Dundas em 1399, em Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1451, em Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Livingstone of Callendar родился около 1375 г. в местности фалкирк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Livingston of Callendar было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Menteith, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Dundas в 1399 г. в местности порт дундас, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1451 г. в местности каллендар парк, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Livingstone of Callendar nació aproximadamente 1375, en Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Livingston of Callendar, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marjorie Menteith, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Janet Dundas en 1399, en Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1451, en Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 77 años.
